description_long: This object consists of two flat-panel computer monitors arranged side by side, each with a thin, black bezel and supported by a rectangular pedestal stand. The screens display a Windows desktop interface, with icons and a blue background visible, suggesting they are powered on and functional. The bezels are slim and uniform, giving the monitors a modern, minimalist appearance. The stands are solid, flat, and rectangular, providing stable support for each monitor. The rear of the monitors is plain and matte black, with no visible ports or branding. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for office or workstation environments.
description: A pair of slim, black flat-panel computer monitors with thin bezels and rectangular pedestal stands, displaying a Windows desktop interface.
description_view_0: Front view showing both monitors side by side, screens powered on with visible desktop interface and thin bezels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the monitors and the depth of the rectangular stands.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, matte black backs of both monitors and the bases of the stands.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the thinness of the monitors and the flat, rectangular stands.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and matte black, with a uniform width around the display area and sharp corners, providing a modern and minimalistic frame.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular flat pedestal base made of matte black material, with a straight vertical support connecting to the center of each monitor; no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons are visible on the front, sides, or stands of the monitors in any view.
